sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse_addr: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal address mapper for DIT input ordering.
sub_modules.fft16_pair_index: Combinational stage and butterfly counter decoder producing p, q, and twiddle indices for the 16-point iterative radix-2 schedule.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM using the required positive sine convention for IFFT.
sub_modules.fft16_ifft_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 IFFT butterfly with rounded Q1.15 complex rotation.
sub_modules.fft16_ifft_output_scale: Combinational final IFFT normalization by arithmetic right shift of 4 bits.
